title: United Kingdom Standard Visitor Visa Application
description: Apply online for a UK Standard Visitor visa: the full visa required by a 'visa national' (someone whose nationality means they must obtain a visa before travelling, rather than being visa-exempt or eligible for the lighter-weight Electronic Travel Authorisation) to visit the UK for up to 6 months for tourism, visiting family or friends, or general business activities, under UK Visas and Immigration's Immigration Rules Appendix V. It costs GBP 135 and is a distinct, more involved process from the already-published gb/homeoffice/eta-application. The online application is followed by an in-person appointment at a Visa Application Centre (VAC) to give fingerprints and a photo (biometric enrolment) and to present supporting documents; this document models only the preceding online application, not the VAC appointment itself. This document models an adult applicant applying for themselves for the standard single 6-month visa, for tourism, family/friend visits, or general business activities. Out of scope: the parallel study visitor, academic visitor (including senior doctor/dentist), permitted paid engagement, and medical visitor sub-routes, each of which gov.uk documents separately with its own extra eligibility requirements and evidence; the Marriage Visitor visa; the long-term multi-entry (2/5/10-year) Standard Visitor visa variant; under-18 applicants; and an application made by a parent/guardian or representative on behalf of someone else. It does not submit the application; the live gov.uk source is always authoritative (see VERIFICATION.md).

source.documentRef: Standard Visitor visa (no form number — online application only, apply-standard-visitor-visa service)

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema opening a second Visa-vertical shape (a full visa, not an ETA) alongside the published us/cbp/esta-application, ca/ircc/eta-application, and gb/homeoffice/eta-application. Authored from the gov.uk 'Visit the UK as a Standard Visitor' overview page, its 'Apply for a Standard Visitor visa' sub-page, the official 'Visiting the UK: guide to supporting documents' publication, and the Home Office 'Visit: caseworker guidance (accessible)' publication (last updated 25 February 2026) for the general eligibility/suitability criteria (Appendix V, paragraphs V4.2-V4.6) caseworkers apply. All four were fetched directly with no access block (gov.uk is not on the blocked-domain list recorded for canada.ca/nzta.govt.nz). The live, authenticated online application form itself was not reachable pre-application (same constraint recorded for the sibling gb/homeoffice/eta-application and us/cbp/esta-application documents), so the field model is reconstructed from the guidance prose describing what the online application collects, not a direct read of the form's screens. Status remains 'draft' pending a field-by-field pass against the live form. See VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: requiresStandardVisitorVisa
fields.label: Does your nationality require you to obtain a Standard Visitor visa before travelling?
fields.description: Determined using gov.uk's 'check if you need a UK visa' tool before applying. True for a 'visa national' who must obtain this visa before travel. If false — the applicant's nationality is visa-exempt, or eligible for the lighter-weight Electronic Travel Authorisation instead — this document does not apply; see the published gb/homeoffice/eta-application document or visa-free entry.
fields.sourceRef: Overview — 'You can check if you need a visa before you apply'

fields.name: intendsToLeaveUkAfterVisit
fields.label: Do you intend to leave the UK at the end of your visit?
fields.description: A core Standard Visitor eligibility requirement (Immigration Rules Appendix V, paragraph V4.2). If false, this document does not apply.
fields.sourceRef: Eligibility requirements — "you'll leave the UK at the end of your visit"

fields.name: canFundVisitAndReturnTravel
fields.label: Can you support yourself (and any dependants) for the whole visit, and pay for your return or onward travel, either yourself or with funding from someone else?
fields.description: Reflects the 'sufficient resources to maintain and accommodate' requirement; the caseworker guidance sets no fixed financial threshold and assesses this on individual circumstances. If false, this document does not apply.
fields.sourceRef: Eligibility requirements — 'you can support yourself and any dependants during your trip, or get money from someone else'; 'you can pay for your return or onward journey'; Visit: caseworker guidance — 'sufficient resources to maintain and accommodate themselves adequately for the whole of their planned visit'

fields.name: onlyIntendsPermittedShortVisit
fields.label: Do you intend only a short, permitted visit — not to live in the UK through frequent or successive visits?
fields.description: If false, this document does not apply; frequent/successive visits amounting to UK residence are refused under the same eligibility requirement.
fields.sourceRef: Visit: caseworker guidance — applicants must not be 'living in the UK or making the UK their home through frequent and successive visits'

fields.name: lastName
fields.label: Last name (surname)
fields.description: As it appears on the passport or travel document used to apply.
fields.sourceRef: Eligibility requirements — 'you have a valid passport or other travel document for the whole of your stay'

fields.name: firstNames
fields.label: First name(s) (given names)
fields.description: As it appears on the passport or travel document.
fields.sourceRef: Eligibility requirements — 'you have a valid passport or other travel document for the whole of your stay'

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of birth
fields.description: Full date, YYYY-MM-DD.
fields.sourceRef: Eligibility requirements — personal details required to identify the applicant

fields.name: nationality
fields.label: Nationality
fields.description: Nationality shown on the passport or travel document; determines whether this route (rather than an ETA or visa-free entry) applies.
fields.sourceRef: Overview — 'check if you need a visa before you apply'

fields.name: passportNumber
fields.label: Passport or travel document number
fields.description: From the passport's or travel document's biographic (photo) page.
fields.sourceRef: Eligibility requirements — 'you have a valid passport or other travel document for the whole of your stay'

fields.name: passportIssueDate
fields.label: Passport or travel document issue date
fields.description: Full date, YYYY-MM-DD.
fields.sourceRef: Eligibility requirements — 'you have a valid passport or other travel document for the whole of your stay'

fields.name: passportExpiryDate
fields.label: Passport or travel document expiry date
fields.description: Full date, YYYY-MM-DD. Must remain valid for the whole of the intended stay.
fields.sourceRef: Eligibility requirements — 'you have a valid passport or other travel document for the whole of your stay'

fields.name: passportIssuingCountry
fields.label: Country that issued the passport or travel document
fields.description: As shown on the biographic page.
fields.sourceRef: Eligibility requirements — 'you have a valid passport or other travel document for the whole of your stay'

fields.name: email
fields.label: Email address
fields.description: Used for the online account, application correspondence, and the visa decision. Not separately spelled out on the guidance pages reviewed, but required by every equivalent online UKVI/gov.uk application in this registry (see VERIFICATION.md).
fields.sourceRef: Apply for a Standard Visitor visa — online application account and decision notification

fields.name: currentAddressLine1
fields.label: Current home address — line 1
fields.sourceRef: Apply for a Standard Visitor visa — "your current home address and how long you've lived there"

fields.name: currentAddressLine2
fields.label: Current home address — line 2
fields.sourceRef: Apply for a Standard Visitor visa — "your current home address and how long you've lived there"

fields.name: currentAddressTownOrCity
fields.label: Current home address — town/city
fields.sourceRef: Apply for a Standard Visitor visa — "your current home address and how long you've lived there"

fields.name: currentAddressPostalCode
fields.label: Current home address — postal/ZIP code
fields.sourceRef: Apply for a Standard Visitor visa — "your current home address and how long you've lived there"

fields.name: currentAddressCountry
fields.label: Current home address — country
fields.sourceRef: Apply for a Standard Visitor visa — "your current home address and how long you've lived there"

fields.name: residentAtCurrentAddressSince
fields.label: Date you started living at your current home address
fields.description: Full date, YYYY-MM-DD. Modelled as a start date rather than a free-text duration for machine precision — answers the online application's "how long you've lived there" question.
fields.sourceRef: Apply for a Standard Visitor visa — "your current home address and how long you've lived there"

fields.name: parent1FullName
fields.label: Parent 1 — full name
fields.description: "If known" — not mandatory when the applicant does not have this information.
fields.sourceRef: Apply for a Standard Visitor visa — "your parents' names and dates of birth (if known)"

fields.name: parent1DateOfBirth
fields.label: Parent 1 — date of birth
fields.description: "If known."
fields.sourceRef: Apply for a Standard Visitor visa — "your parents' names and dates of birth (if known)"

fields.name: parent2FullName
fields.label: Parent 2 — full name
fields.description: "If known."
fields.sourceRef: Apply for a Standard Visitor visa — "your parents' names and dates of birth (if known)"

fields.name: parent2DateOfBirth
fields.label: Parent 2 — date of birth
fields.description: "If known."
fields.sourceRef: Apply for a Standard Visitor visa — "your parents' names and dates of birth (if known)"

fields.name: partnerFullName
fields.label: Spouse or partner — full name
fields.description: Left blank if the applicant has no spouse/partner.
fields.sourceRef: Apply for a Standard Visitor visa — 'partner information'

fields.name: hasFamilyMembersInUk
fields.label: Do you have family members in the UK?
fields.sourceRef: Apply for a Standard Visitor visa — 'family in UK'

fields.name: familyInUkDetails
fields.label: Details of your family members in the UK
fields.description: Name, relationship, and immigration/citizenship status of each UK-based family member.
fields.sourceRef: Apply for a Standard Visitor visa — 'family in UK'

fields.name: employmentStatus
fields.label: Employment status
fields.description: employed = works for an employer. self_employed = runs their own business. student = currently studying. retired = retired from work. unemployed = not currently working. other = any other status.
fields.sourceRef: Apply for a Standard Visitor visa — 'Employer details'

fields.name: employerNameAndAddress
fields.label: Employer name and address
fields.description: Name and address of the applicant's employer.
fields.sourceRef: Apply for a Standard Visitor visa — 'Employer details'; Guide to supporting documents — 'letter from your employer on company headed paper, detailing your role, salary and length of employment'

fields.name: occupationOrJobTitle
fields.label: Occupation or job title
fields.sourceRef: Apply for a Standard Visitor visa — 'Employer details'; Guide to supporting documents — 'business registration documents or recent invoices that confirm on-going self-employment'

fields.name: annualIncome
fields.label: Annual income
fields.description: "If you have an income." Currency is not specified by the source; enter in GBP or the applicant's home currency as the online application prompts.
fields.sourceRef: Apply for a Standard Visitor visa — 'how much you earn in a year (if you have an income)'

fields.name: fundingSource
fields.label: Who is funding this trip?
fields.description: self = the applicant is funding the trip themselves. third_party = a sponsor (e.g. family member, friend, or organisation) is funding some or all of the trip.
fields.sourceRef: Apply for a Standard Visitor visa — 'anyone funding your trip'

fields.name: thirdPartyFunderNameAndRelationship
fields.label: Name and relationship of the person or organisation funding your trip
fields.sourceRef: Apply for a Standard Visitor visa — 'anyone funding your trip'; Guide to supporting documents — sponsorship evidence

fields.name: purposeOfVisit
fields.label: Purpose of visit
fields.description: tourism = holiday/sightseeing. visiting_family_or_friends = visiting relatives or friends. business_activities = permitted business activities (e.g. attending a meeting or interview) that are not employment. other_permitted_activity = any other permitted general visitor activity not covered by the dedicated study/academic/permitted-paid-engagement/medical sub-routes (out of scope for this document — see description).
fields.sourceRef: Overview — permitted visit activities (tourism, family/friend visits, business activities, and other purposes)

fields.name: intendedArrivalDate
fields.label: Planned UK arrival date
fields.sourceRef: Apply for a Standard Visitor visa — "the dates you're planning to travel to the UK"

fields.name: intendedDepartureDate
fields.label: Planned UK departure date
fields.sourceRef: Apply for a Standard Visitor visa — "the dates you're planning to travel to the UK"

fields.name: accommodationDuringVisit
fields.label: Where you'll be staying during your visit
fields.description: Address or name of the accommodation (e.g. hotel, host's address).
fields.sourceRef: Apply for a Standard Visitor visa — "where you'll be staying during your visit"

fields.name: estimatedTripCost
fields.label: Estimated total cost of the trip
fields.description: Currency is not specified by the source; enter in GBP or the applicant's home currency as the online application prompts.
fields.sourceRef: Apply for a Standard Visitor visa — 'how much you think your trip will cost'

fields.name: countriesVisitedInLast10Years
fields.label: Countries visited in the last 10 years
fields.description: Free-text list of countries visited (and approximate dates), "depending on your circumstances."
fields.sourceRef: Apply for a Standard Visitor visa — 'your travel history for the past 10 years, depending on your circumstances'

fields.name: previouslyRefusedUkVisaOrEntry
fields.label: Have you ever been refused a UK visa, or refused entry to the UK?
fields.description: Not an automatic bar to this route, but a mandatory declaration a caseworker weighs under the Appendix V / general suitability requirements.
fields.sourceRef: Overview — 'you've previously been refused entry to the UK' (voluntary application note)

fields.name: hasCriminalConvictions
fields.label: Do you have any criminal convictions, in the UK or overseas?
fields.description: Mandatory suitability self-declaration. Unlike gb/homeoffice/eta-application, this document does not assert a specific conviction/sentence-length threshold: the Visit: caseworker guidance defers to the separate general grounds for refusal (Part 9 of the Immigration Rules) without restating exact thresholds on the pages reviewed — see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: Apply for a Standard Visitor visa — 'Details of criminal, civil, or immigration offences'; Visit: caseworker guidance — general grounds for refusal (Appendix V, paragraphs V4.2-V4.6)

fields.name: previouslyBreachedUkImmigrationLaw
fields.label: Have you ever breached UK immigration law (e.g. overstaying, working illegally)?
fields.description: Mandatory suitability self-declaration.
fields.sourceRef: Apply for a Standard Visitor visa — 'Details of criminal, civil, or immigration offences'

fields.name: criminalCivilOrImmigrationOffenceDetails
fields.label: Details of the criminal, civil, or immigration offence(s)
fields.sourceRef: Apply for a Standard Visitor visa — 'Details of criminal, civil, or immigration offences'

documents.label: Passport or other travel document
documents.sourceRef: Eligibility requirements — 'you have a valid passport or other travel document for the whole of your stay'; Guide to supporting documents — 'valid passport or other travel document'

documents.label: Evidence of funds for the visit
documents.sourceRef: Guide to supporting documents — 'bank statements which detail the origin of the funds held'; 'building society books which detail the origin of the funds held'; 'proof of earnings, such as a letter from your employer'

documents.label: Sponsor's identity, financial, and immigration-status evidence
documents.sourceRef: Visit: caseworker guidance — sponsorship evidence must show the sponsor's identity, financial capacity, relationship to the applicant, and UK legal status

documents.label: Employment, self-employment, or education evidence
documents.sourceRef: Guide to supporting documents — 'letter from your employer on company headed paper, detailing your role, salary and length of employment'; 'letter from your education provider, on headed paper, confirming your enrolment and leave of absence'; 'business registration documents or recent invoices that confirm on-going self-employment'

documents.label: Letter of invitation from the business organiser
documents.sourceRef: Guide to supporting documents — 'letter of invitation from the organiser'

documents.label: Copies of previous passports showing travel history
documents.sourceRef: Guide to supporting documents — 'copies of previous passports showing evidence of travel to other countries'
